BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: WILLIAM J AND ANN M ROLL

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: THE FOUNDATION ACCOMPLISHES ITS CHARITABLE PURPOSES SOLELY THROUGH A PROGRAM OF MAKING CHARITABLE GIFTS AND DOES NOT CONDUCT ANY DIRECT CHARITABLE ACTIVITIES OR MAKE PROGRAM RELATED INVESTMENTS. THEREFORE, ALL ARE ADMINISTRATIVE EXPENSES.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: GENERALLY AWARDS MADE WITH 50 MILE RADIUS OF NORTHUMBERLAND, PA

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: DIAPER AND MILK ASSISTANCE FOR BABIE
